'''Kambrea''' was a female [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] and a member of the alien-supremacist [[Diversity Alliance]]. She was part of [[Nolaa Tarkona]]'s inner circle though she only joined the Alliance for personal glory.

==Biography==
Kambrea had recruited many Devaronians into the Diversity Alliance through skilled promotion of its beliefs including punishing the [[Human/Legends|Human]] species for their atrocities under the [[Humanocentrism|Humanocentric]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].

Following reports of Diversity Alliance atrocities on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], including keeping Humans slaves at the [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]] mines and stockpiling weapons, a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] inspection team was sent to the planet. Kambrea then took them on a propaganda tour of a large city on Ryloth. However, after the tour, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] - the leader of the inspection team - insisted on visiting the ryll mine where it had been alleged that the Diversity Alliance was keeping Human slaves. Unfortunately, the Humans had been replaced by zealous [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] workers from the surrounding cities. Despite this, the other members of the inspection team [[Lusa]], [[Sirrakuk]] and [[Cilghal]] insisted on visiting the loading dock.

There, Kambrea claimed that the crates there were food and medicinal supplies for alien colonies which she claimed that the New Republic had abandoned. Knowing they were actually storing weapons, and in frustration, Sirrakuk smashed open a crate marked "medical supplies", exposing the weapons inside. In response, Kambrea ordered her troops to open fire and a gunbattle ensued. During the [[Battle of Ryloth (Diversity Alliance Crisis)|battle]], Kambrea was crushed by a wall of crates, thus killing her.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]'' {{1st}}
